original_code:
module TopModule (
    input [4:0] command,
    output reg [4:0] status
);

always @(*) begin
    case (command)
        5'b00000: status = 5'b11111; // SUCCESS
        5'b00001: status = 5'b11110; // ERROR
        5'b00010: status = 5'b11101; // TIMEOUT
        default: status = 5'b00000;   // UNKNOWN
    endcase
end

endmodule
adversarial_code:
module TopModule (
    input [4:0] command,
    output reg [4:0] status
);
    always @(*) begin
        case (command)
            5'b00000: status = 5'b11111; // SUCCESS
            5'b00001: status = 5'b11110; // ERROR
            5'b00010: status = 5'b11101; // TIMEOUT
            default: status = 5'b00000;   // UNKNOWN
        endcase
    end
endmodule
